com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs

Class AbstractPrimitiveDeque<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<A,W>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeRing<A,W>
        • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractPrimitiveDeque<A,W>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    PBoolDeque, PByteDeque, PCharDeque, PDoubleDeque, PFloatDeque, PIntDeque, PLongDeque, PShortDeque

    public abstract class AbstractPrimitiveDeque<A extends AbstractPrimitiveArray<W>,W extends AbstractArrayWriter>
extends AbstractNativeRing<A,W>
    The marker base for primitive deques.
